## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Skill content is in English (docs can be bilingual)
- [ ] YAML frontmatter has name + description
- [ ] Description is a trigger ("when to use me"), not a summary
- [ ] If new pattern: has termination conditions + degradation path
- [ ] If new example: includes failure branch + "why this pattern"
- [ ] No company-specific content (internal tools, proprietary names)
- [ ] Tested against at least 3 scenarios

## Type

- [ ] New pattern
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Improvement to existing pattern
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
